notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, pitcher Emerson Hancock to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Zach Neto out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cole Young plunked
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Cole Young hit by pitch. J.P. Crawford to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds into a force out, third baseman Oswald Peraza to second baseman Adam Frazier. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd.
